info.title: Your API Title
info.description: API documentation for your Laravel application

get.description: Returns walking steps or training activities

post.description: Add or remove training activity from user's favorites

is_favorite.description: Current favorite status (false = add, true = remove)

put.description: Updates user's daily steps and calculates burned calories

items.example: The email has already been taken.
The password confirmation does not match.

post.description: Authenticate user and return access token
Logout user and invalidate access token

get.description: Returns diary data for a given date. **IMPORTANT**: Save `diary_note_id` and `user_meal_id` from response - it will be required for other diary operations.

parameters.name: movement
parameters.description: Navigate to previous/next day with diary entries

diary_note_id.description: **SAVE THIS VALUE!** Required for all subsequent diary operations

get.description: Returns redirect information for editing a product, recipe, or dish
Returns dish information with nutritional values

parameters.name: user_meal_id
parameters.description: User meal ID (for editing existing meal)

post.description: Adds a restaurant dish to the diary

delete.description: Removes a dish from the diary

get.description: Returns list of products or recipes for meal selection

parameters.name: productsOrRecepies
parameters.description: Type of items to return (products or recipes)

post.description: Add or remove product/recipe from user's favorites

is_favorite.description: Current favorite status (false = add, true = remove)

get.description: Returns all available filter options for recipes
Returns filtered recipes based on selected filters

parameters.name: cooking_method
parameters.description: Filter by cooking method (multiple allowed). **Example:** boiled

post.description: Activates premium subscription for the user

get.description: Returns product information for editing or adding to meal

parameters.name: meal_type
parameters.description: Type of meal (required when adding new product)

parameters.name: user_meal_id
parameters.description: User meal ID (for editing existing meal)

post.description: Adds a product to the specified meal

put.description: Updates the amount of a product in a meal

get.description: Returns current step and user data

put.description: Saves data for current step and returns next step

get.description: Returns user's food preferences and allergies

all_allergies.description: All available allergies with their display names

patch.description: Updates user's food preferences and allergies

message.example: The food preferences field is required.

items.example: The selected food preferences is invalid.

get.description: Returns recipe information for editing or adding to meal

parameters.name: meal_type
parameters.description: Type of meal (required when adding new recipe)

parameters.name: user_meal_id
parameters.description: User meal ID (for editing existing meal)

post.description: Adds a recipe to the specified meal

put.description: Updates the amount of a recipe in a meal

post.description: Authenticate restaurant and return access token

get.description: Returns list of restaurants with optional type filter
Returns restaurant details and its dishes
Returns all dishes for authenticated restaurant
Returns detailed information about a specific dish

post.description: Add a new dish to restaurant menu

get.description: Returns list of training categories for filtering
Returns filtered list of available trainings

parameters.name: categories
parameters.description: Category IDs to filter (use 'all' for all categories)

training_id.description: Training ID to sign up for

message.example: Already signed up for this training

get.description: Returns list of trainings user signed up for

Retrieve user targets and goals information

fields.description: Available fields with their display names

get.summary: Get edit form for specific target field

parameters.name: user_id
parameters.description: User ID (optional, uses current user if not provided)

current_value.description: Current value of the field being edited

patch.description: Update a specific target field for a user

user_id.description: User ID (optional, uses current user if not provided)

value.description: New value for the field (type depends on field)

put.description: Increases or decreases water consumption by 0.25L

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: Action type: 'empty' - add water (+0.25L), 'full' - remove water (-0.25L)
